title: Bountiful Amethyst
description: A mod that gives amethyst more uses. Tries to be vanilla and survival-friendly.
body:
A mod that gives amethyst more uses in a vanilla-friendly and survival-friendly manner (with some basic magic of course :P)

## Features

- Smelt Amethyst for easy xp
- Magic weapons for mid and lategame
- (WIP) Advanced enchanting with a new table
- ... and more TBD.

This is my first mod created with Fabric
